title: Mob Hat
description: A hat that lets you pick up and carry any mob
body:
# Mob Hat

Mob Hat is a hat that lets you carry mobs inside it. It's also a very classy hat.

![Classy hat](https://github.com/Gaming32/mob-hat/raw/main/images/classy_hat.png)

## Picking up mobs

Picking up mobs is very easy! Simply right-click. Right-click again to place them down.

![Picking up mobs](https://github.com/Gaming32/mob-hat/raw/main/images/picking_up_mobs.gif)

## Crafting recipe

![Crafting recipe](https://github.com/Gaming32/mob-hat/raw/main/images/crafting_recipe.png)

<sup>Thanks to destruc7i0n for their [crafting generator](https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/) used for this image.</sup>

## Advancements

This mod adds two advancements—one for picking up a rabbit with the hat, and another secret one. For all you datapack devs out there, this mod also adds a `mob_hat:mob_hat` advancement trigger with one condition called `entity`, which is an entity condition, the same as `minecraft:summoned_entity`.
